text: Fill out the players, place your bets and Shake your phone or press the button to draw a card.
Four Aces are the horses. Each player bets on one suit and drinks their stake before the game.
Reveal a card: matching horse moves forward by 1. Bettor distributes their stake.
When all horses reach a sideline column, flip that card: matching horse moves back by 1; bettors drink their own stake.
First horse past the finish wins. Winners distribute 2× their stake; losers drink their stake.
